body:
## Summary

A play may now only close COMPLETED by proving its "Done means" — a baked manifest of mechanical clauses evaluated against the run's artifacts at close; unmet closes HALTED with every failed clause named; legacy plays unaffected until recompile; the compiler plus a gated lint teach the standard. First real carrier is the Stage 2 pilot #465.

## Self-Review

### Scope checks

| Check | Verdict | Evidence |
|-------|---------|----------|
| Matches the issue | PASS | All 4 commits carry #464. The core diff (play-close.md, evidence-file.md, play-creator/SKILL.md, check_stop_condition.py + fixtures, both lint_play.py copies) is exactly Stage 1c of epic #460 — nothing beyond the stop-condition feature. |
| No scope creep | FLAG | Commit `933fa89 chore(install): record self-install manifest and ignore-rule trim from the #463 redeploy` carries no #464 reference — a side effect of re-running `install-garura` locally after #463 landed on main, not part of this issue's intent. Noted, not blocking: chore/STM-class only (install-manifest.json + `.garura/.gitignore` comment trim), touches no play/skill logic. |
| Reasonable size | PASS | 20 files, 525 insertions / 4 deletions; single-sitting review. |
| No stray artifacts | PASS | No commented-out code, debug prints, or scratch files. Non-code files are legitimate STM context or the install chore above. |

### Quality checks

| Check | Verdict | Evidence |
|-------|---------|----------|
| Tests present | PASS | Ran both proofs directly: `held` fixture → exit 0, all 3 clauses (D1-D3) held. `unmet` fixture → exit 1, all 3 clauses unmet, each with its own detail (missing artifact, wrong verdict value, failing gate counts). |
| Commits are clean | PASS (with the FLAG above) | 4 commits, conventional format (`feat(components)`, `chore(stm)` x2, `chore(install)`), each a coherent concern. 3 of 4 reference #464; the install-manifest commit references #463 instead. |
| No secrets | PASS | Grepped the full diff for api-key/secret/password/token/private-key patterns — no hits beyond doc prose using "token" in its plain-English sense. |
| Docs in step | PASS | The interface-facing docs (play-close.md Step C0, evidence-file.md frontmatter + Stop Condition section, play-creator/SKILL.md Done-means + bake-step) are updated in the same change as the mechanism they describe. |
| Nothing obviously broken | PASS | Re-ran `lint_play.py` against all 5 pipeline plays (commit-change, propose-change, review-change, merge-change, start-change) — all still `VERDICT: PASS (0 gap(s))`, and the new stop-condition check line doesn't even appear in their output, confirming the gate is legacy-transparent. No leftover TODOs. |

**Verdict: PASS — 8 of 9 checks clean, 1 flagged (non-blocking).**

Closes #464

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

title: feat(components): machine-checkable stop condition in plays (#464)
